## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypermode and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up; tone/volume improving](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [3 key product entry points: knowledge graphs, multi-modal interface (launching soon), and agent building (waitlist)](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Performance spike due to migrated blog content; strategy to leverage unlisted articles discussed](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing current content flow; case studies/user stories potential future consideration](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

## Topics

### Product Strategy Context

  - [Multiple entry points to Hypermode's product:](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
    1.  Knowledge graphs (focus on financial services and healthcare industries)
    2.  Multi-modal interface for model testing (launching in \~10 days)
    3.  Agent building framework (waitlist CTA)
  - [Emphasis on driving content to support these entry points and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/z5thpGE4WwyznYXPs_thW3MNvx1Bdfeu?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
